landing.tagline:
AI analyzes your notes to diagnose
cognitive errors and provide personalized feedback.

auth.loginDesc: Enter your email and password to continue.
auth.registerDesc: Enter your email and password to get started.
auth.emailAlreadyUsed: This email is already in use.
auth.termsDesc: Please agree to the following terms to use the service.
auth.termService: [Required] I agree to the Terms of Service.
auth.termPrivacy: [Required] I agree to the Privacy Policy.
auth.termMarketing: [Optional] I agree to receive marketing emails.
auth.termsRequired: Please agree to all required items.
auth.forgotDesc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotSent: Email sent. Please check your inbox. (Also check your spam folder.)
auth.networkError: A network error occurred. Please try again.

onboarding.step1Desc: Write down thoughts from work, analysis notes, or draft text freely. Format doesn't matter.
onboarding.step2Desc: As soon as you save, AI analyzes your record and detects cognitive error patterns like confirmation bias and anchoring.
onboarding.step3Desc: Get specific improvement suggestions tailored to your thinking patterns, not just error identification.
onboarding.step4Desc: As you apply the feedback, cognitive errors decrease and your thinking becomes clearer and more persuasive.

dashboard.title: Home
dashboard.noRecords:
No records yet.
Write your first one!

records.title: Records
records.desc: View your records and analysis status.
records.deleteConfirmDesc: This record cannot be recovered. Are you sure you want to delete it?
records.empty: No records yet. Write your first one.

newRecord.title: Write a record
newRecord.desc: Write your thoughts, analysis notes, or draft freely.
newRecord.label: Content
newRecord.placeholder: Write your thoughts freely here. (min. 20 characters)
newRecord.cancelDialogDesc: Your draft will not be saved.
newRecord.offline: You're offline. Please check your network connection.
newRecord.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.detailDesc: AI-analyzed cognitive errors and improvement suggestions.
feedback.loadingDesc: Detecting cognitive error patterns. Please wait.
feedback.skipped: This record was saved without analysis.
feedback.disclaimer: AI analysis results are for reference only and do not replace professional psychological counseling or medical diagnosis.

contact.desc: Leave your inquiry about the service.
contact.name: Name
contact.successDesc: We'll get back to you soon.
contact.sendError: Failed to send. Please try again.
contact.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.changeError: Failed to change password. Please try again.
settings.deleteDesc: All records and analysis data will be immediately deleted and cannot be recovered.
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: All records and analysis data will be immediately and permanently deleted.
